pages.text: In a colourful land filled with feelings, there lived a boy named Fafa.

blocks.text: In a colourful land filled with feelings, there lived a boy named Fafa.

pages.text: Fafa was a cheerful boy who loved to run and play all day.

blocks.text: Fafa was a cheerful boy who loved to run and play all day.

pages.text: But he had a special gift: his feelings could come to life.

blocks.text: But he had a special gift: his feelings could come to life.

pages.text: One day, Fafa woke up feeling grumpy. Grumpy Cloud, with a frown on their face, followed Fafa around all day.

blocks.text: One day, Fafa woke up feeling grumpy. Grumpy Cloud, with a frown on their face, followed Fafa around all day.

pages.text: Whenever Fafa tried to play, Grumpy Cloud would make everything sad.

blocks.text: Whenever Fafa tried to play, Grumpy Cloud would make everything sad.

pages.text: Fafa tried his best to shake off Grumpy Cloud... but nothing worked.

blocks.text: Fafa tried his best to shake off Grumpy Cloud...

pages.text: He tried dancing, but Grumpy Cloud was STILL there.

blocks.text: He tried dancing, but Grumpy Cloud was STILL there.

pages.text: Mama decided to tickle Grumpy Cloud. It DIDN’T work.

blocks.text: Mama decided to tickle Grumpy Cloud.

pages.text: Mama tried again and Grumpy Cloud smiled slightly, but Grumpy Cloud stayed.

blocks.text: Mama tried again and Grumpy Cloud smiled slightly, but Grumpy Cloud stayed.

pages.text: Mama tickled Grumpy Cloud one last time. A giggle came out and Grumpy Cloud went away.

blocks.text: Mama tickled Grumpy Cloud one last time. A giggle came out and Grumpy Cloud went away.

pages.text: Fafa laughed with joy and a happy little smile appeared.

blocks.text: Fafa laughed with joy and a happy little smile appeared.

pages.text: Fafa knew that it was okay to have different feelings, as long as he knew his way back to his smile.

blocks.text: Fafa knew that it was okay to have different feelings,
as long as he knew his way back to his smile.
